verbatim_quote: Before 2023, I thought we were quite a long way from super intelligence, and if we made the AI models more like brains, they get smarter. I cease to believe that in 2023.
gloss: [ANALOGY] Before 2023, I thought we were quite a long way from super intelligence, and if we made the AI models more like brains, they get smarter. I cease to believe that in 2023.
